sections.paragraph: ἀναϑεματίζω [ἀνάθεμα; ‘to devote to evil’] ‘to invoke consequences if one says what is not true’ cp. the colloquial ‘I’ll be damned, if...’ invoke a curse, with acc. Ac 23:12, 14, 21; intr., in a passage where the combination ἤρξατο ἀναϑεματίζειν ϰαὶ ὀμνύναι probably is designed to magnify a pathetic picture of Peter Mk 14:71.
